debug_info.goal:
case left
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
c : C
⊢ iSupIndep fun p => ↑p c

failed_attempts:
exact I.sSupIndep.iSupIndep_subtype.pointwise c
  · exact I.pointwise_sSup_eq_top c
intro p; exact I.sSupIndep p.2 c

rw [iSupIndep_iff_disjoint]
    intro i
    have h := iSupIndep_iff_disjoint.mp I.sSupIndep.iSupIndep_subtype i
    rw [PersistenceSubmodule.disjoint_apply] at h
    simpa [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply] using h c
intro p; exact I.sSupIndep p.2 c

intro i
    rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply]
    exact PersistenceSubmodule.disjoint_iff.mp (I.sSupIndep.iSupIndep_subtype i) c

exact I.sSupIndep.iSupIndep_subtype.pointwise c
  · exact I.pointwise_iSup_eq_top c

intro i
    rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply,
      (sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep_subtype I.carrier).mp I.sSupIndep i, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]
intro p; exact I.sSupIndep p.1 p.2 c

rw [iSupIndep_iff_disjoint_iSup]
    intro i
    have h := iSupIndep_iff_disjoint_iSup.mp (sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep_subtype.mp I.sSupIndep) i
    rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, h.eq_bot,
      PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]

intro i
    simpa [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply,
      PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply, disjoint_iff] using
      sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep_subtype.mp I.sSupIndep i

intro p
    rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.disjoint_apply]
    exact sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep_subtype.mp I.sSupIndep p
exact fun i ↦ I.sSupIndep i.2 c

intro i
    rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, (I.sSupIndep i).eq_bot]
    rfl
  · exact pointwise_iSup_eq_top I c

intro i
    simpa [← PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply] using
      sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep_subtype.mp I.sSupIndep i

intro i
    have h := iSupIndep_iff_disjoint_iSup.1 (sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep_subtype.1 I.sSupIndep) i
    rw [disjoint_iff] at h ⊢
    exact congr_arg (· c) h
